question: What happens to Sunstone Amulets when they are brought into the Shadow Fen?

answers.ground_truth: When Sunstone Amulets are brought into the Shadow Fen, their power is completely drained or nullified by the area's dark magic.
answers.original: The Shadow Fen's dark magic nullifies the magical energy of a Sunstone Amulet.
answers.perturbed: The Shield of Dawn is resistant to the Shadow Fen's dark magic.

entities.name: Shadow Fen
entities.description: The Shadow Fen is a vast, magical swamp on the southern border of Aethelgard, known for its ambient dark magic and necrotic energies.

entities.name: Shield of Dawn
entities.description: The Shield of Dawn is a magical item resistant to the Shadow Fen's dark magic.

entities.name: Sunstone Amulet
entities.description: A Sunstone Amulet is a magical item crafted from petrified sunlight and silver threads, symbolizing the Aethelgardian royal family.

entities.name: Petrified Sunlight
entities.description: Petrified sunlight is a component used in crafting Sunstone Amulets.

relations.description: The Shadow Fen's dark magic nullifies the magical energy of a Sunstone Amulet.
The Shield of Dawn is resistant to the Shadow Fen's dark magic.
Sunstone Amulets are crafted from petrified sunlight.
The Shadow Fen is located on the southern border of Aethelgard.
The last king of Aethelgard is said to have been lost in the Shadow Fen.
The Grasping Vine is a dangerous plant found in the Shadow Fen.
